title: BCL launches its 2025 season with a multicultural cricket showcase
author: BCL Media
excerpt: Brisbane Champions League returns with a bigger season, stronger franchises and a premium match-day experience.

body.text: Brisbane Champions League is preparing for a landmark season that will bring together top multicultural teams, emerging players and community supporters in a professionally managed T20 environment.
With live coverage, strong franchise identity and high-quality venues, the 2025 season is designed to create a premium experience for players, fans, sponsors and partners.
The league continues to operate under the AMCC vision of building communities through cricket and creating pathways for multicultural participation across Australia.
